privileged_info_summary: The stone_countertop_fabrication task requires creating an L-shaped granite countertop drawing in LibreCAD with specified geometric parameters. All geometric specifications are verified: outer profile dimensions 3000mm (X-axis) by 2400mm (Y-axis) with 600mm depth; internal corner fillet radius of 50mm at coordinates (600, 600); sink cutout of 800×450mm centered at (1500, 300); cooktop cutout of 500×500mm centered at (300, 1500). Output file saved as countertop.dxf in DXF format with STONE layer (Cyan/color 4) and CUTOUTS layer (Red/color 1). Data is synthetic, generated from task specification with no external dataset dependency.
